title: Good Morning Hellen
summary: April 30, 2018 Samantha Hill, known as Good Morning Hellen, is Kanien’kehá:ka (Mohawk) from the Six Nations of the Grand River. A singer-songwriter with an authentic voice, Samantha has been writing original music for more than ten years. Her songs have a musicality that conveys hope, expansiveness,...

title: KUAC-FM Archival Recordings Available Online
summary: More than 120 hours of archival recordings from KUAC-FM, the public radio station in Fairbanks, Alaska, are now available for listening online. The KUAC-FM Audiotapes Collection consists of nearly 950 open-reel audiotapes containing original local KUAC-FM programs from the late 1970s through the 199...
